name: Constraint-Aware Hierarchical Search for Regulation-Driven Fine-Grained Classification

description: arXiv:2607.10588v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Tasks such as customs tariff classification, export control categorization, and standards-based equipment coding require assigning an input instance to a fine-grained class under an explicit regulatory hierarchy. Unlike standard text classification, the correct label in these tasks is not determined by semantic similarity alone, but by rule-define...
author: Siyu Wang, Wei Tan, Lulu Chen
